raw_source.title: [深圳/远程] 诚聘 区块链后端/钱包开发工程师
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
DePIN可穿戴设备项目，已获得融资

## 薪资福利待遇
20-25k

## 地点

- 工作地点：深圳/remote
- 联系方式：buptdaniel2017@gmail.com

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：optional

## 岗位要求、职责

职责：
参与crypto钱包开发相关工作，与产品经理，移动端工程师配合，设计满足安全、可扩展性和性能要求的钱包解决方案
任职要求：
1.web3领域开发工作经验1年以上
2.熟悉node.js，熟悉web端链上交互常用代码库如web3.js，ether.js等
3.熟悉solidity，熟悉智能合约和EVM原理，有智能合约开发经验优先。
4.熟悉crypto钱包的基本原理，对加密算法和钱包安全有一定了解
5.能够适应创业公司工作节奏，对工作有热情，独立完成各项工作，与团队良好协作。
6.熟悉java后端开发优先


Responsibilities:
Participate in the development of crypto wallets, working with product managers and mobile engineers to design wallet solutions that meet requirements for security, scalability, and performance.
Requirements:
1.Experience: Over 1 year of development experience in the web3 field.
2.Technical Skills:
Proficient in Node.js.
Familiar with commonly used blockchain libraries like web3.js and ether.js.
3.Smart Contracts:
Proficient in Solidity.
Familiar with the principles of smart contracts and EVM.
Prior experience in smart contract development is preferred.
4.Crypto Wallets:
Understanding of the basic principles of crypto wallets.
Knowledge of encryption algorithms and wallet security.
5.Work Ethic:
Ability to adapt to the fast-paced environment of a startup.
Passionate about the work, capable of independently completing tasks, and collaborating effectively with the team.
6.Additional Skills:
Familiarity with java backend development is preferred.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
